rulings.Case Title: NANCY MGGINNIS VS. SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING INC. ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 14, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT SELECT PORTFOLIO SERVICING INC., ABS LOAN TRUST VI DEMURRER to 2ND Amended COMPLAINT is continued to February 26, 2021. Plaintiff to obtain/locate a copy of the operative contract requiring the lender to provide periodic monthly bills/conditioning borrower's payment on receipt of the periodic monthly bill. A copy of the contract to be provided to the Court no later than February 22, 2020. The relevant contract clause shall be highlighted and tabbed.=(501/CFH)

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 14, 2020 line 2. DEFENDANT VALERIE CHEW DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is continued to January 26, 2021 per stipulation and order. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: IRENE CHEUNG ET AL VS. DOUGLAS GOOD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Declaration That Any Potentially Applicable Federal, State And Local Moratoriums Either Do Not Apply To This Matter, Or That There Is An Exception To Any Applicable Moratorium That Exempt This Order From The Moratorium And Related Health Orders
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 14, 2020 line 3. PLAINTIFF IRENE CHEUNG, BENNY CHEUNG Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Declaration That Any Potentially Applicable Federal, State And Local Moratoriums Either Do Not Apply To This Matter, Or That There Is An Exception To Any Applicable Moratorium That Exempt This Order From The Moratorium And Related Health Orders is GRANTED. May 11, 2020 order issued is amended and supplemented as follows: "any potentially applicable federal, state and local moratoriums do not apply this matter involving health and safety issues." =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: THIRD BAPTIST GARDENS, INCORPORATED VS. STEPHANIE SHIVER ET AL

rulings.Case Title: YOLANDA YAN TING LI ET AL VS. VIRGINA MOLINA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 14, 2020 line 5. DEFENDANT ERICK CHIM, VIRGINIA MOLINA Notice And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Special Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions is continued to December 21, 2020 per the order of the presiding judge. =(501/CFH)

rulings.Case Title: CARITAS MANAGEMENT CORPORATION VS. DARRELL GRANT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 14, 2020 line 6. DEFENDANT DARRELL GRANT MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT Hearing Required. By no later than December 14, 2020 by 8:30 a.m. Defendant to file a supplemental declaration addressing (1) the phone number listed on Defendant's Answer; (2) Defendant's failure to appear for trial call at 9:00 a.m. as directed (Defendant was not present at the initial roll call for trial call by the staff or for the first call by the judge); and (3) Defendant's failure to appear for settlement conference at 2:00 p.m. on October 19, 2020 as directed (as of 2:27 p.m. on October 19, 2020 Defendant was not present in Department 220). =(501/CFH)
